description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository, uses the docker:latest image (no extra services), and defines global variables GIT_DEPTH='0' and MAVEN_OPTS with TLS, local repo, logging, and headless settings. Define stages build, test, use, and deploy, include the Code‑Quality and Dependency‑Scanning templates, and add a code_quality job (stage test) that generates gl-code-quality-report.json and, via the code_quality_html job, gl-code-quality-report.html as artifacts retained for two weeks. In the build stage add a maven-build job using the debian:bullseye image that runs: apt update; apt install -y eatmydata; eatmydata apt install -y openjdk-17-jdk openjdk-17-jre maven; eatmydata java -version; eatmydata mvn -v; eatmydata mvn package -B; and publishes target/*.jar and target/generate*/** as two‑week artifacts. In the test stage add a noark5tester-runtest job (debian:bullseye) that runs apt update; apt install -y eatmydata; eatmydata apt install -y curl wget iptables libdevmapper-dev systemctl jq apt-transport-https gnupg lsb-release openjdk-17-jre openjdk-17-jdk; scripts/keycloak-setup-start.sh &; wait for http://localhost:8080/ with curl loops; eatmydata apt install -y maven git curl python3 unoconv python3-tz tesseract-ocr-nor; eatmydata git clone https://codeberg.org/noark/noark5-tester; eatmydata scripts/run-runtest; and stores nikita-run.log as a two‑week artifact, with variables admin_password, admin_username, baseurl, client_name, password, realm_name, role_name, username. In the use stage add a noark5tester-inoutin job (debian:bullseye) that runs the same setup steps but executes eatmydata scripts/run-inoutin-test and archives nikita-run.log, noark5-tester/json-dump-*/**, noark5-tester/uttrekk-*/**, and noark5-tester/nikita-*-validation-report.txt as two‑week artifacts.
